data.revised_prompt: Clean HD 2D game character concept for a cultivation roguelite: a new full-body female xianxia cultivator hero for “Samsara Ascension.” Use the provided reference image only for overall style and mood, not pose, face, or background. Subject: elegant young female cultivator with wood-and-sword spirit-root feeling, long dark hair, jade-and-gold hair ornament, pale jade forehead gem, white and light-jade daoist robes, translucent teal ribbons, warm gold trim, slim jade sword held close to the body, subtle qi aura hugging the silhouette. Composition: full body visible, top-down 45-degree three-quarter RPG view, neutral hero pose, centered, generous padding, feet anchor visible, character occupies about 68% of the canvas. Style: polished fantasy RPG asset, clean HD hand-painted 2D character concept, crisp silhouette, controlled painterly detail, simplified fine details, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Lighting/mood: soft celestial glow, refined jade palace atmosphere, readable edge lighting for gameplay. Materials/textures: silk robes, translucent ribbon accents, polished jade ornament, light brushed metal sword fittings. Color palette: white, pale jade, teal, warm gold, dark ink hair; avoid magenta in the character. Constraints: single character only; perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key background only, one uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation; no scene background; no UI; no text; no watermark; no extra characters; no large detached spell effects; keep hair and ribbons inside the canvas; maintain game-readable silhouette; simplify micro details while preserving premium hand-painted look; avoid messy background, hyperreal skin pores, extreme jewelry detail, extra arms, extra weapons, cropped feet, oversized aura, purple-dominant palette.
